privacy.scope: exact Git-visible release set under the experiment root, enumerated by git ls-files --cached --others --exclude-standard

release_exclusions: runs/smoke/, runs/smoke-unsandboxed/, and runs/preflight/ (development/preflight activity outside the 400-call plan)
runs/**/runner/.run.lock, __pycache__/, and *.py[cod] (ephemeral local state excluded by .gitignore)
Sanitized command.json is Git-visible and may remain in the release.
